svg.text: → GitHub + PyPI + VS Code + Claude plugin
— deploy harness to a new repo
Commands run inside Claude Code chat — not in terminal
~109k subagent tokens → ~2k returned to main thread (context firewall)
④ PLUGIN · SESSION CONTINUITY · DEPLOY PIPELINE
→ auto-publishes pool + MCP + VS Code ext
by plugin changes; manages pool for IDE sidebar
→ run preflight subagent against it first
CLI spike on Gitea runner (next phase)
When any CLAUDE.md exceeds ~80 lines, dispatch
1. Read agent-log.jsonl — flag 0-run or >60% FAIL agents
2. Run golden tasks in eval/tasks/<agent>/ · 3. New model? Bake-off
When skills/agents change in agent-sandbox, run
to sync pool → GitHub → PyPI → VS Code → plugin
